---
title: "test_ws_pubsub_empire.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_ws_pubsub_empire.ts"
loc: 36
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.80
style_score: 3.93
intel_score: 2.51
overall_score: 4.91
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 2 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [beforeEach](file://node:test)
- [afterEach](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [EventManager](file://../../src/node/core/EventManager.js)
- [WebSocket](file://ws)
- [*](file://node:events)

### Exports
- `em`
- `mockWs1`
- `data`
- `mockWs2`
- `mockWs`
